svg.title: Bedroom three memory fragment (apartment four) - emotionally unfinished
svg.desc: Looking into the corner of a small, freshly-moved-into bedroom: a bare overhead bulb on a cord casts a fixed warm pool over a single bed against the right wall. The bed has a smooth off-white duvet, a single pillow at the head, and a small folded sage throw at the foot. Where the nightstand would be, a sealed cardboard moving box stands in service, with a small water glass placed on top. A leaning mirror rests on the floor against the cream wall; its tiny reflection holds the room a little too crisply. A bare nail and a single washi-taped photo are the only marks on the wall. By the window, a small black folding chair holds a stack of bedsheets still in plastic wrap. The window has a curtain rod with bare hooks on the left, and only a single sheer panel hung on the right. Beyond, a sky that has not changed for hours. Nothing animates.
